_notes.fps: Animation speed. 8 = smooth walk, 4 = slower/heavier feel.
_notes.scale: Render size multiplier over TILE_SIZE (32px). 1.5 = 48px sprite.
_notes.idleFrame: Index of the frame shown when standing still. Usually 0.
_notes.frameCount: Number of PNG files per direction subfolder (0.png … 3.png for 4 frames). Omit this field entirely to let the loader auto-detect by probing until a 404.
_notes.directions: Which subfolders exist. Any direction not listed here will fall back to 'down' frames. You can ship a sprite with only 'down' frames and all directions will use them (useful for simple objects).
_notes.mirror_left: If you don't have a 'left' subfolder, remove 'left' from directions. PlayerSprite will automatically mirror the 'right' frames for left-facing movement.
